{{documentation}}
This template displays an infobox for [[monsters]].

==Usage==
This template can be used by entering the following onto a relevant monster page.

<pre>{{Infobox Monster
|name = 
|image = 
|imagesize = 
|release = 
|update = 
|location = 
|race = 
|power_level = 
|health = 
|weakness = 
|resistance = 
|immune = 
|aggressive = 
|respawn =
}}</pre>

==Parameters==
===name===
The name of the monster.

===image===
An image of the monster.

===imagesize===
The size of the image (if not default).

===release===
The date when the item was added to the game. Need to add as plain text, no link tags needed.

===update===
The exact name of the update (without the keyword Update:) in which the item was released.

===location===
Where the monster can be found.

==race==
What race does the monster belong to.
===power_level===
The power level of the monster.

===health===
The healthpoints of the monster.

===weakness===
The weakness of the monster (if any).

===resistance===
The resistance of the monster (if any).

===immune===
The monster immune to (if any).

===aggressive===
Whether the monster is aggressive or not towards the player.

===respawn===
The respawn timer for the monster (e.g., 10 Days).

{{TemplateData|
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"name": {
			"label": "Name",
			"type": "string",
            "description": "Name of the monster",
			"required": true
		},
        "image": {
			"label": "Image",
            "description": "Image of the monster",
			"type": "wiki-file-name",
			"suggested": true
		},
        "imagesize": {
            "label": "Image size",
            "description": "The size of the image (if not default)",
            "default": "300",
            "type": "number"
        },
        "release": {
			"label": "Released",
            "type": "string",
            "description": "The date when the item was added to the game. Always use alongside with update parameter",
            "suggested": true
        },
        "update": {
			"label": "Released",
            "type": "string",
            "description": "The exact name of the update (without the keyword Update:) in which the item was released. Always use alongside with update parameter",
            "suggested": true
        },
        "location": {
			"type": "line",
            "label": "Location",
            "description": "Where can you find the monster",
			"suggested": true
		},
        "power_level": {
			"label": "Power level",
            "description": "Power level of the monster",
			"type": "number",
			"suggested": true
		},
        "health": {
			"label": "Health",
            "description": "Healthpoints of the monster",
			"type": "number",
			"suggested": true
		},
        "weakness": {
			"label": "Weakness",
            "description": "What is the weakness of the monster (if any)",
			"type": "string",
			"suggested": true
		},
		"resistance": {
			"label": "Resistance",
            "description": "What is the resistance of the monster (if any)",
			"type": "string",
			"suggested": true
		},
		"immune": {
            "label": "Immune",
            "description": "What is the monster immune to (if any)",
            "default": "No",
            "type": "string"
        },
        "aggressive": {
			"label": "Aggressive",
 			"type": "string",
            "description": "Is the monster aggressive or not towards the player",
            "suggested": true
        },
        "respawn": {
			"label": "Respawn Time",
 			"type": "string",
            "description": "Respawn time of the monster",
            "suggested": true
        }
	},
    "description": "Infobox describing a monster.",
	"paramOrder": [
		"name",
		"image",
        "imagesize",
        "release",
        "update",
        "location",
        "power_level",
		"health",
		"weakness",
		"resistance",
        "immune",
        "aggressive",
        "respawn"
	],
    "format": "block"
}
</templatedata>
}}

<includeonly>[[Category:Infobox templates|Monster]]</includeonly>
